summary: Persian-language intelligent shopping search engine that finds and compares products from Iranian online stores (Digikala, Bamilo, etc.) with automatic discovery and manual link addition. Accepts text and image input, ranks results by: 1) lowest price, 2) proximity to Qom/Tehran, 3) seller reputation/reviews. Features blue neon UI, saves search history, displays product images with clickable links.
architectural_notes: Persian (Farsi) language UI with appropriate fonts for Iran
Priority ranking: 1) Price (lowest), 2) Geographic proximity (Qom/Tehran/Kashan/Arak regions first), 3) Seller reputation
Support APIs from Iranian e-commerce platforms (Digikala, Bamilo, etc.)
Image analysis for product identification using AI
known_issues: Direct access to Telegram, Eitaa, Instagram not possible - using public store APIs instead
Audio/video processing requires external services that may be filtered in Iran

existing_features.title: Add a menu section in the UI where users can manually input original store links (URLs) so those links become part of the system's future search sources. Store these custom links persistently in the backend.
Support both text and image input for product search queries. Display appropriate input UI elements (text field and image upload icon) in the main search card.
Test the frontend SearchInput component to ensure text input accepts Persian characters correctly and triggers search when clicking the search button or pressing Enter

Test the ProductResults component to verify that search results display correctly with product images, Persian titles, prices in Toman, store names, city badges, reputation stars, and clickable external links
Test the StoreManagement component to ensure users can add new stores with Persian names and URLs, select Iranian cities from the dropdown, set reputation scores, and delete added stores
Fix any RTL layout issues in the UI where text alignment, spacing, or component positioning does not correctly support right-to-left Persian content
Fix any issues with the blue neon styling theme to ensure consistent application across all interactive elements including buttons, input fields, cards, and hover states

Verify that the image upload functionality in SearchInput displays the upload button icon correctly and shows a preview when an image is selected, even though image-based search is not yet implemented in the backend
Test navigation between Search view and Store Management view using the header buttons to ensure smooth transitions and state preservation

Debug and fix the search functionality to ensure that when users click the search button or press Enter after typing a Persian product query (e.g., 'گوشی', 'لپ‌تاپ'), the system displays product results instead of showing the 'هنوز جستجویی انجام نشده' message. Verify the complete flow from SearchInput component through useProductSearch hook to the backend searchByProductTitle function.

Analyze and test the complete search flow in both frontend and backend to identify why search results are not displaying. Check: 1) SearchInput component properly calls the search handler, 2) useProductSearch hook correctly invokes the actor method, 3) backend searchByProductTitle function processes the query and returns results, 4) ProductResults component receives and renders the returned data.

Enhance the StoreManagement component to create a comprehensive form that collects all information required by the search engine from users who want to add their stores. The form must include fields for: store name (Persian), store URL/link, city selection (from existing Iranian cities dropdown), reputation score (1-5 stars), and any additional metadata needed for search ranking and product discovery.

Connect the enhanced StoreManagement form to the backend by implementing the submission handler that calls the backend addCustomStore function with all collected form data. Display success toast notification in Persian when store is added successfully, and error toast if submission fails. Clear the form fields after successful submission.

new_feature_requests.summary: Automatic product search across Iranian online stores with price comparison
Manual link addition feature in menu to add custom store sources
Text and image input support for product search queries
Ranking algorithm: price (lowest first), location proximity (Qom/Tehran priority), then reputation/reviews
Blue neon UI with Persian fonts, input card with text/image upload icons
Display product images alongside clickable store links in results

Implement automatic product discovery that searches across Iranian online stores (Digikala, Bamilo, etc.) when user submits a text or image query. The system must fetch real product data including title, price, store name, product URL, and product image.

Implement ranking algorithm that sorts product results by: 1) lowest price first, 2) proximity to Qom/Tehran area, 3) seller reputation and customer reviews. Display the ranking logic clearly in results.

Test the searchByProductTitle functionality in the backend with various Persian product queries (e.g., 'گوشی موبایل', 'لپ‌تاپ', 'کتاب') and verify that results are returned with correct title, price, store name, and city information

Update the backend to support persistent storage of user-submitted stores with all required fields: store name, URL, city, reputation score, and any additional metadata. Ensure the addCustomStore function (or equivalent) saves this data to stable storage and makes it available for future search queries.
